entry.title: めざせポケモンマスター！
entry.content:
留档一些对局

  • 被自己帅哭！！

    https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen7ou-1183919194

  • 钱神杯小组赛第一把, vs F-岩之柱，败北！苦呀西(´;︵;`)

​ https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8bdspubers-1481290075-2xj6qv37bbd1s0gjg8vnrdsgiy4obuipw

  • 其他四把f组小组赛

    vs Replay
    安龙 https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8bdspubers-1488063228-onqmvjgs1uqeva4su0v51ug54rkppllpw 负
    大同 https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/china-gen8bdspubers-4185078 胜
    羽 https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/china-gen8bdspubers-4156417 胜
    洗衣姬 https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8bdspubers-1496342554 胜

    总结 :

    一轮游！小组赛都没出，寄！有点爽的地方是最后当了把水鬼赢了洗衣姬，嘻嘻

  • 双换一穿四

​ https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8ou-1413295304

  • 直钩钓鱼

    https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8ou-1388141736-ih355g49kx70pfmkd99pf40p59g5fagpw

  • 钓鱼,乐

    ☆Mindphuck2: Hi just a friendly warnint

    FFFFives进入了房间

    ☆Mindphuck2: i think my team is invincible

    lebanesestinker进入了房间

    i am missing还剩120秒。

    ☆i am missing: ok

​ https://replay.pokemonshowdown.com/gen8ou-1388580581
